address: 17 Woodlands Park Road, Offerton, Stockport SK2 5DE, United Kingdom
notes: Shopify Payments KYC, PayPal OAuth, wallet device tests, DNS ownership, SSL issuance wait, customer-account mode, and staff order-email routing require merchant Admin actions. No secrets stored in this repo.

steps.title: Shopify Payments / PayPal activation (UK)
actions: Confirm store owner access and GBP currency
Activate Shopify Payments for United Kingdom with legal business details and Stockport address
Link UK GBP payout bank account and complete identity verification
Confirm cards active and SCA/3-D Secure left on
Connect PayPal Business under Additional payment methods / Express checkout
Optionally add manual Bank deposit / collection methods for trade
Run low-value paid test order and full refund
acceptance_criteria: Shopify Payments status Active/Verified or documented alternative gateway live
Test order Paid then Refunded (or manual payment path documented)

steps.title: Google Pay / Apple Pay
actions: Enable Google Pay under digital wallets
Enable Apple Pay under digital wallets
Enable theme dynamic checkout buttons if missing
Test Google Pay in supported Chrome/Android browser
Test Apple Pay in Safari on Apple device after custom domain + SSL
Disable wallets deliberately if trade policy prefers cards/BACS only
acceptance_criteria: Wallet buttons appear on product/cart/checkout on primary domain, or wallets disabled by policy
Optional small wallet test order succeeds

steps.title: Custom domain connection
actions: Obtain DNS access for icomplyservices.co.uk (or chosen brand domain)
Settings → Domains → Connect existing domain
Add CNAME shop → shops.myshopify.com (copy exact target from Shopify Admin)
Remove conflicting DNS records for that host
Verify connection until status Connected
Set custom domain as primary
Redirect icomply-supplys.myshopify.com to primary
Update marketing site CTAs and external links
acceptance_criteria: https://shop.icomplyservices.co.uk (or chosen host) loads Shopify storefront
myshopify.com redirects to primary custom domain

steps.title: SSL (HTTPS)
actions: Wait for Shopify TLS certificate status Issued after domain Connected
If Cloudflare/proxy used: DNS-only during connect or Full (strict) SSL — avoid Flexible
Check browser padlock on primary URL and through checkout
Re-test Apple Pay on custom HTTPS domain
acceptance_criteria: SSL certificate Issued for primary domain
Checkout remains on https:// with secure padlock

steps.title: Checkout customer accounts for trade
actions: Set customer accounts to optional (recommended) or required for trade-only policy
Review new vs classic customer accounts and complete login branding if prompted
Settings → Checkout: require email; set phone required for trade despatch if preferred
Confirm Company name available on address/checkout for B2B buyers
Do not auto-fulfil physical goods unpaid/manual orders
Tag approved trade customers manually (e.g. trade-approved) if not using Shopify B2B Companies
Smoke-test guest checkout and account signup → login → checkout
acceptance_criteria: Guest and/or account checkout paths work on mobile and desktop
Trade process for unpaid/manual orders documented for staff

steps.title: Order notification email
steps.admin_path: Settings → Store details; Settings → Notifications; Settings → Users
actions: Set store contact / sender-related email to monitored address
Ensure owner or staff user is icomplypropertyservices@gmail.com with Orders access
Enable staff/new-order email notifications for that user
Add Gmail filter so Shopify order mail is not lost in Spam/Promotions
Place test order and confirm staff notification arrives at Gmail
Confirm customer still receives Order confirmation
acceptance_criteria: New order email received at icomplypropertyservices@gmail.com

go_live_gates: Shopify Payments or alternative card gateway Active with payout bank linked
Google Pay / Apple Pay enabled and smoke-tested or consciously disabled
Custom domain Connected, primary, myshopify redirects
SSL Issued; HTTPS padlock on primary URL and checkout
Customer accounts mode set for trade; guest/login checkout tested
New order email arrives at icomplypropertyservices@gmail.com
Test order paid and refunded or manual payment path documented
